endDate.description: The last date the subscription is available for purchasing

gracePeriodMinutes.description: The subscription grace period in minutes

householdLimitationsId.description: The household limitation module identifier associated with this subscription

isCancellationBlocked.description: Is cancellation blocked for the subscription

isInfiniteRenewal.description: Indicates whether the subscription will renew forever

isRenewable.description: Denotes whether or not this subscription can be renewed

isWaiverEnabled.description: Indicates whether or not the end user has the right to waive his rights to cancel a purchase

maxViewsNumber.description: The maximum number of times an item in this usage module can be viewed

mediaId.description: Identifier of the media associated with the subscription

pricePlanIds.description: Comma separated subscription price plan IDs

prorityInOrder.description: Subscription order (when returned in methods that retrieve subscriptions)

renewalsNumber.description: Defines the number of times this subscription will be renewed

startDate.description: The first date the subscription is available for purchasing

viewLifeCycle.description: The amount time an item is available for viewing since a user started watching the item

waiverPeriod.description: Time period during which the end user can waive his rights to cancel a purchase. When the time period is passed, the purchase can no longer be cancelled
